title: Japan's AI Alliance: Can Industry Beat Giants? — Apr 13
summary: Japan's top industrial and financial firms are uniting with SoftBank to build a sovereign AI foundation, reducing reliance on US and Chinese models. Meanwhile, AI adoption in healthcare, finance, and manufacturing is accelerating, with measurable gains in efficiency and decision speed — though deployment gaps and security risks persist.
source_titles: Steel giants, automakers, and banks plan to build Japan's answer to US and Chinese AI dominance
